'''Vandos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Vandos system/Legends|Vandos system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was controlled by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
[[File:Grievous-on-Vandos.jpg|thumb|300x330px|left|Grievous on Vandos]]
In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] sent [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Jmmaar/Legends|Jmmaar]], [[Flynn Kybo]] and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[T'chooka D'oon]], along with a battalion of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], to [[Rescue mission to Vandos|rescue]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Quiyyen]] from [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces here.

It turned out to be a trap, as they were ambushed by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], flanked by tens of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2-series super battle droids]]. T'chooka D'oon and Jmmaar were killed in the assault, but Flynn Kybo was able to escape with Quiyyen, bringing him safely back to the Republic.

==Appearances==
*[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] {{1st}}
